news.t: A Prudent Play for the Small-Cap Rally
ALPS | O'Shares Exchange-Traded Funds to Transfer Listing to NYSE Arca
This small-cap fund is outperforming the Russell 2000. Here's how it works

holdings.infoBox: OUSM is an equity ETF with a total of 109 individual holdings. The top holdings are TD SYNNEX stock at 3.73%, Avnet at 3.33%, National HealthCare at 3.32%, Royalty Pharma at 2.93%, and Lincoln Electric Holdings at 2.22%.

overview.description: The ALPS O'Shares US Small-Cap Quality Dividend ETF (OUSM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund tracks an index of US small-cap stocks weighted for exposure to quality, low volatility, high dividend yield, and dividend quality factors. OUSM was launched on Dec 30, 2016 and is issued by SS&C.
infoTable: O'Shares US Small-Cap Quality Dividend Index

data.title: A Prudent Play for the Small-Cap Rally
data.text: Small-cap investors rejoice. The Russell 2000 Index is higher by more than 16% year-to-date, confirming smaller stocks are back with a vengeance, but there is a caveat.

data.title: ALPS | O'Shares Exchange-Traded Funds to Transfer Listing to NYSE Arca
data.text: DENVER--(BUSINESS WIRE)--SS&C ALPS Advisors announced today plans to transfer the listing of the ALPS | O'Shares U.S. Small-Cap Quality Dividend ETF (Ticker: OUSM), ALPS | O'Shares U.S. Quality Divide...

data.title: This small-cap fund is outperforming the Russell 2000. Here's how it works
data.text: With unprofitable companies representing 40% of the small-cap index, a top ETF provider is identifying ways for investors to capture better returns.

data.title: How to find profitable small caps
data.text: Only 40% of small cap companies are profitable. Paul Baiocchi, ALPS ETF chief strategist, joins CNBC to discuss how his fund is weeding them out and collecting them.
